title: A Spell Passed Down Through the Academy?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Is that really true? There's something that
wondrous at the academy?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I only just heard about it too, but apparently!
They say it's a kind of happiness spell that's been
passed down through generations of students at
the academy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So let's get going! I wanna find out the truth
about this!
choice_data_list: Sure, but where do we do that?
Sure, but where do we do that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Good question! If it's a spell passed down
person-to-person, that means someone must
know it right now! So we gotta ask around!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
A legendary oral tradition, huh? ♪ Come to think
of it, I've heard there's a sect of druids that pass
on their teachings orally instead of through
writing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We've already got some good info! Druidic
teachings... How mysterious!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, it's been passed down deep within a
forest. That must be useful for keeping it secret.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: We're off to the forest, then! Let's go, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: There's nothing here!
choice_data_list:
Because we're in the wrong country... and
century!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: A spell for happiness? Leave it to me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
First, get some lip balm ready! Then push it out as
far as you can...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, all I have to do is write your name on the
stick and recite the spell as the sun sets...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nothing happened! "A fateful moment of
happiness" is supposed to "occur"! Doesn't that
mean magic?!
choice_data_list:
Uh... Why don't we head back? It's almost
dinner time.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No! I can't just give up if I know there's magic to
be found!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I gotta learn a ton of spells if I want to be a great
witch like Grandma!
choice_data_list: But we don't have any leads...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ngh... But I wanna know the happiness spell!

Exquisite! Your thirst for knowledge is truly
admirable!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
So you're the one who's been asking around
about the academy's happiness spell!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm! It's a spell known by only a handful of
people at the academy! For you to seek it so
fervently that word of your efforts has reached
my ears...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's say I'm impressed! As a reward for all
your efforts, I shall entrust you with the secret of
the spell!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Here we are.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If we recite the spell the director taught us here,
some incredible magic should activate!

I got all the ingredients...
Huh? What are you two doing here?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: The treasure ship transports joy.

...Well now. Are you prepared for the
consequences of the words you've recited?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Uh, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Here you are! Our secret menu item, the Hearty
Treasure Ship Parfait!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
It was removed from the menu for budgetary
reasons, so now it's only passed down to those
who truly desire the biggest dessert at all costs...

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
It's like a forbidden spell! I'm surprised anyone
still knows about it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: S-so this is the result of the magic?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all that frantic searching, it turns out the
spell was just a password for a secret menu item!
She's going to throw a tantrum!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oooh! It's sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is great! A random dessert right out of
nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This was so worth it. You don't find amazing spells
like this every day!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is exactly why I can't stop searching for new
spells! This magical parfait is the best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she was going to say it isn't magical at
all... but it seems like she has a much more broad
and optimistic view of magic than I realized.
choice_data_list: It really was a happiness spell!
It really was a happiness spell!
Maybe I should try it too.
Maybe I should try it too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she was going to say it isn't magical at
all... but it seems like she has a much more broad
and optimistic view of magic than I realized.
choice_data_list: It really was a happiness spell!
It really was a happiness spell!
Maybe I should try it too.
Maybe I should try it too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right. You get it, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All righty, now to dig in! I'm gonna eat every last
bite!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but smile, seeing her get so excited
over her giant dessert.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Look at you, a mere familiar thinking you can
use forbidden spells!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But... maybe I can allow it once in a while. You
did help me find it, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I often catch sight of Sweep Tosho in
the cafeteria, proudly casting her spell.
